content.en:
"You three stay here, I'll go in and have a look!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

Jian Heng and the three of them nodded again and again, they didn't dare to go in, otherwise no matter how strong Ye Tian was, he might not be able to protect them.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled to the island, it was full of countless killing machines, the aura left over from the original battle still did not dissipate, if ordinary legends entered the Dao Realm, they would be wiped out by the killing machines here.

But for him, it wasn't dangerous.

He moved quickly, approaching Jian Xuan's body.

That's when danger struck.

All around, a large number of legendary bitter beasts appeared, seemingly emerging from some lair in the middle of the island.

But these legendary bitter beasts are all very weak kind of legendary bitter beasts, just a large number.

Bang!!!!!

Ye Tian shot and killed these legendary bitter beasts one by one, all of them were killed in seconds, and then killed in seconds!

Jian Heng and the three of them had been watching the situation inside the island, and they were still quite nervous in their hearts, they hoped that Ye Tian would quickly bring out the body of the ancestor, and then they could escape.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian killed all these legendary bitter beasts, but then a bigger crisis came.

Airplanes!!!

Four transparent humanoid creatures emerged all around, each exuding a terrifying Second Sequence Supreme Dao Rule, and the terrifying aura even permeated many territories beyond the island.

Jian Heng and the others looked at the four transparent humanoid creatures, and their faces suddenly changed drastically.

They remembered a legend.

Spirit of Legends!

Legend has it that there are legendary spirits in the bitter sea, and each legendary spirit is not something that the legendary Dao realm can deal with, even if the patriarchs encounter it, they are in danger, and there are four legendary spirits here.

Immediately afterward, they finally arrived at why the ancestor died in battle, but they did not escape.

"Where the spirit of legend is located, it must have given birth to a legendary spirit object, each legendary spirit object can make a legend to the Dao realm break through to the patriarch, and it can also make the elder cultivate as a breakthrough, and it can easily break the bottleneck of the legendary body, and even change the foundation, make the foundation stronger, and make the understanding permanently improved!"

Jian Heng said secretly.

It is rumored that the top ten elders in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance have all obtained legendary spiritual objects, and the original foundation is not strong, far inferior to those elders who have taken the road to the strongest path, but after having the legendary spiritual objects, the gap in the foundation has been filled, even if there is still a gap, but the gap is not big.

Therefore, the most powerful group of elders of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance are not the elders who have taken the path of supreme strength and path.

"The ancestor wanted to obtain the legendary spiritual object, so he tried his best, but after he couldn't hit it hard, he wanted to escape but it was too late!"

Jian Heng almost expected the situation.

And Ye Tian also guessed it.

"Spirit of Legends!"

Ye Tian didn't want to fight with the four legendary spirits, so he rushed directly to the body of Jian Xuan.

Rumble!!!!

The four legendary spirits killed Ye Tian, Ye Tian fought with him, and the four strongest legendary bodies broke out, which was also his true strength in front of Jian Heng and them.

Thundered!!!!!

Terrifying battles swept all around.

This scene also made Jian Heng and them stunned.

"Four Legendary Bodies !!"

Jian Heng couldn't believe it, and even suspected that he had read it wrong.

But the three of them looked at each other to make sure they weren't mistaken.

"Elder Ye has taken the path of the strongest and most of the Dao, and he has cultivated the body of the strongest legend, not only cultivated to the realm of perfection, but also cultivated four kinds of legendary body, although the fourth type of legendary body has not yet been perfected, but this is too exaggerated!"

"How did Elder Ye do it?"

"Maybe Elder Ye's ontology has already broken through, but he hasn't shown it, and this is his true strength!"

"That's the only possibility!"

Of course, they didn't think of the Innate Primordial Treasure, after all, they hadn't heard of the Innate Primordial Treasure that could assist in cultivating the Legendary Body, so they didn't expect it.

......

Under the siege of the four legendary spirits, Ye Tian still forcibly came to the location of Jian Xuan's body, took it away, and then quickly rushed out of here.

Of course.

He also asked Jian Heng and them to go first in advance, otherwise the spirit of legend would chase them over, and Jian Heng and them would die.

Swish!

Ye Tian rushed out of the island, and then quickly escaped.

And the Spirit of Legend did chase it out, but it didn't last long before it returned.

"It seems that the spirit of legend will not chase it out for too long in order to harvest the spirit of legend!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After a while, he met with Jian Heng and them again.

He didn't covet the corpse of Jian Xuan, he also knew that the corpse of Jian Xuan was not simple, and it was likely that there were good things hidden, but there was no need for that.

There is no need for him to offend the Sword Clan, even if the Sword Clan has no patriarch now, who knows if there will be an elder in the future?

Moreover, the sword clan's voice in the Innate Origin Alliance is also very high, even if he is not afraid, but the human race will have to have a good relationship when it integrates into the Innate Origin Alliance in the future.

"This is the body of your ancestor, take a look!"

Ye Tian said.

Jian Heng immediately put away the body of the ancestor and secretly spied it.

"The Innate Primordial Treasure is still there!"

He breathed a sigh of relief.

Immediately, he hurriedly thanked, "Thank you, Elder Ye." "

"Let's go, we need to get out quickly!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good good !!"

Jian Heng hurriedly responded.

They didn't want to stay here anymore, it would be too dangerous.

Then they returned.

Along the way, they encountered many legendary bitter beasts again, but they were all solved by Ye Tian.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian's other copied bodies rushed to the Spirit of Legends.

He is ready to kill the four Legendary Spirits and seize the Legendary Spirits.

After a period of time, Ye Tian's other replica body rushed here, and then began to condense more and more replica bodies.

Six replicating bodies were successfully condensed.

"Six to four, there must be no problem!"

Ye Tian entered the island.

Soon, four legendary spirits appeared, fighting with Ye Tian's six replica bodies.

Ye Tian had to admit that the strength of the four legendary spirits was still very strong, second only to his copy body, but the number was not as good as his copy body, and it would inevitably be defeated in his hands.

Thundered!!!!!

After a long time, Ye Tian took the lead in killing a legendary spirit, completely scattering and annihilating his body.

After that, Ye Tian killed the other legendary spirits one by one.

Finally, all four legendary spirits fell.

Immediately, Ye Tian entered the lair of the legendary spirit, looking for the unknown legendary spirit object.
